name: Meanwhile, Verlangen Kingdom
description:
Requested by @FrosmanceIsBack

Source: asmallotter

I'm not gonna lie. I got sidetracked for a while on this.

Okay so...

Just imagine the prison's hierarchy, but turn it into a Fantasy World.

You get this place. No colors, no collars or bracelets, n' all. But like any other Isekai to EVER EXIST, ranks exist.

To summarize:

F Rank - Game over, man. Game over. (Essentially Blues)

E Rank - "So, you're just weak, but you can carry our luggage for us."

D Rank - Heal. Heal. Heal.

C/B Rank - "SEND DUDES!"

A Rank - Literally just imagine reds, but assholes ALL the time.

S Rank - Yeah... no. You might as well just beg, if you're below this rank.

Guess what Rank YOU are...

"? Rank - Unlimited" or "F Rank but Not F Rank."

Because you're the main character.

Monsters scale too. They can level up and train just like you can. Also slavery apparently.

Sidenote - Don't let your guard down. Slimes can be menaces.

Any adventurer that dies will respawn at the guild. Just trust me on this tho, if you're naked as a norm, don't kill your teammates willingly. You will regret it.

(I added a full battling system, leveling system, currency, learning, and everything here, apparently.)

Anyways any scenario you suggest, I will try to consider adding, okay?

Here an image for not doing that before:

Bot of the day - From @Zero64
creator: NXback
